---
name: Capstone submission
about: Share a real task you automated with Claude Code
title: "[Capstone] <short title>"
labels: capstone
---

## The task (before)
What did you do manually/repeatedly, and roughly how long did it take?

## What you built
Which building block — skill / subagent / hook / MCP — and what it does.

## How to run it
Commands / where the artifact lives (link a PR if you added it under `demos/` or `skills/`).

## Time saved
Rough estimate per week.

## Anything reusable for others?
Could a teammate use this tomorrow? What would they need to change?
